{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = UNKNOWN ARTIFACT
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[UNKNOWN ARTIFACT]] originated from [[Planet Murrok]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[UNKNOWN ARTIFACT]] is an obsidian jewel that shifts its configuration.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
